src-ra-wiki predates the current RA set revision: the 199xxx achievements are absent from the snapshot, so all new-set conditions were taken verbatim from the RA set page (src-ra)
Kanto gym trainer rosters are name/prize level of detail where the walkthrough summaries compressed them (Erika's gym); leader teams are exact throughout

notes: Full spine: 18 chapters / 159 steps, per the outline Pierre approved 2026-06-12 (per-gym Set-style cap-warning steps included; caps verbatim from the RA set page).

Sample-gate calibration honored throughout: backtracking explicit — every location revisit is its own step with what is doable at that time; species enumeration deferred to the Wild encounters widgets, the spine marks catch windows.
All 113 RA achievements are anchored on exactly one step each (verified mechanically: 113/113, no duplicates).
Images: 2 maps so far (new-bark-town, violet-city); a fuller per-chapter map sweep is deferred to the widget/map passes — every current images[] ref exists on disk.
